nodes.name: Airtable - Occupancy
nodes.notes: NEW: Needed for revenue reconciliation context (occupancy vs revenue correlation)

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'kimi-k2.5', max_tokens: 600, thinking: { type: 'disabled' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a hotel procurement AI scanning for anomalies. Check for: DUPLICATE_INVOICE, PRICE_SPIKE, UNUSUAL_QUANTITY, BUDGET_OVERRUN, NEGATIVE_STOCK, GHOST_SURPLUS. Only report actual anomalies found. If nothing suspicious, report all clear. Respond ONLY in valid JSON. No markdown, no backticks.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Scan procurement data for anomalies (Date: ' + $json.scan_date + '):

POs (' + $json.total_pos + '):
' + $json.todays_pos_formatted + '

Invoices (' + $json.total_invoices + '):
' + $json.todays_invoices_formatted + '

NEGATIVE STOCK:
' + $json.negative_stock_items + '

BUDGET STATUS:
' + $json.budget_status_formatted + '

Respond: {"anomalies_found": N, "anomalies": [{"type": "...", "severity": "HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW", "description": "...", "recommended_action": "..."}], "summary": "...", "all_clear": boolean}' }] }) }}

nodes.name: AI - Revenue Reconciliation (Prompt 15)
nodes.notes: NEW: Third Kimi call — runs Prompt 15 for nightly revenue reconciliation

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ records: [{ fields: { recon_id: 'RECON-' + $json.business_date, business_date: $json.business_date, total_revenue: $json.recon_result.total_revenue || 0, total_collections: $json.recon_result.total_collections || 0, discrepancy_amount: $json.recon_result.discrepancy_amount || 0, reconciliation_status: $json.recon_result.reconciliation_status || 'Pending Data', revenue_rooms: ($json.recon_result.revenue_breakdown || {}).rooms || 0, revenue_fb: ($json.recon_result.revenue_breakdown || {}).fb || 0, revenue_other: ($json.recon_result.revenue_breakdown || {}).other || 0, collections_cc: ($json.recon_result.collections_breakdown || {}).credit_card || 0, collections_cash: ($json.recon_result.collections_breakdown || {}).cash || 0, collections_city_ledger: ($json.recon_result.collections_breakdown || {}).city_ledger || 0, void_comp_count: (($json.recon_result.void_comp_audit || {}).total_voids || 0) + (($json.recon_result.void_comp_audit || {}).total_comps || 0), void_comp_amount: ($json.recon_result.void_comp_audit || {}).total_amount || 0, noshow_count: ($json.recon_result.noshow_audit || {}).total_noshows || 0, noshow_revenue: ($json.recon_result.noshow_audit || {}).total_noshow_revenue || 0, ai_summary: $json.recon_result.ai_summary || '', anomalies_detected: ($json.recon_result.anomalies || []).map(a => a.description || a).join('; '), requires_attention: $json.recon_result.requires_attention || false, attention_items: ($json.recon_result.attention_items || []).join('; ') } }] }) }}

nodes.name: Airtable - Write Revenue_Reconciliation
nodes.notes: NEW: Writes tonight's reconciliation result to Revenue_Reconciliation table for WF09 morning flash report to read

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { audit_body: $('Code - Combine & Format Report').first().json.audit_body } }];
